tasks.title: Extract apply planning and preview-safe config mutation path
tasks.verification: Completed apply planning extraction with checkpoint commit ad32a4fe8b2d3102a82f726ec13774c5aaa405dc.
tasks.summary: Added `internal/config/apply_plan.go` with `ApplyPlan`, `ConfigMutation`, `BuildApplyPlan`, `BuildPreferencesApplyPlan`, and `Preview`. Refactored `ApplyPreferences` to build a plan first, then perform the existing backup, atomic write, owner-only permission write, and backup pruning. Added tests proving planning does not write/back up, plan output matches `ApplyPreferences`, and invalid chains fail without updated bytes.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `internal/config/apply_plan.go` with `ApplyPlan`, `ConfigMutation`, `BuildApplyPlan`, `BuildPreferencesApplyPlan`, and `Preview`. Refactored `ApplyPreferences` to build a plan first, then perform the existing backup, atomic write, owner-only permission write, and backup pruning. Added tests proving planning does not write/back up, plan output matches `ApplyPreferences`, and invalid chains fail without updated bytes.

tasks.title: Add routing-stack domain/view-model helpers
tasks.verification: Completed routing-stack helpers with checkpoint commit fcb99efd8a905ab36818ac8d195f5b8ddda79e89.
tasks.summary: Added `RoutingStack`, `RoutingValidationFinding`, `BuildRoutingStacks`, and `ValidateRoutingStack` in `internal/tui/routing_stack.go`. Helpers normalize config state and preferences into primary+fallback view models, skip unmappable main agents, prefer pending prefs over discovered state, reuse `config.ValidateFallbackChain`, and optionally report unavailable models when registry data is provided. Added tests for preference override, discovered fallback chain, unmappable main-agent skip, structural validation, and availability findings.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `RoutingStack`, `RoutingValidationFinding`, `BuildRoutingStacks`, and `ValidateRoutingStack` in `internal/tui/routing_stack.go`. Helpers normalize config state and preferences into primary+fallback view models, skip unmappable main agents, prefer pending prefs over discovered state, reuse `config.ValidateFallbackChain`, and optionally report unavailable models when registry data is provided. Added tests for preference override, discovered fallback chain, unmappable main-agent skip, structural validation, and availability findings.

tasks.title: Add OMR-native `omr` command and build/install path
tasks.verification: Added OMR-native `cmd/omr` entry point, switched default Makefile build/install to `omr`, kept `build-omp` compatibility, and extended Makefile contract checks.
tasks.summary: Implemented `cmd/omr/main.go` with OMR-prefixed refresh/load/no-model/TUI errors and graceful interrupt handling. Added `cmd/omr/main_test.go` covering startup refresh and OMR-native no-model error. Updated Makefile default `build`/`install` to produce/install `omr`, added `build-omp` compatibility target, and cleaned both binaries. Extended `scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh` to assert default build/install path targets `omr`. Checkpoint commit: 5c8c7223a2007c15857f522b58194b7e122548a0.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented `cmd/omr/main.go` with OMR-prefixed refresh/load/no-model/TUI errors and graceful interrupt handling. Added `cmd/omr/main_test.go` covering startup refresh and OMR-native no-model error. Updated Makefile default `build`/`install` to produce/install `omr`, added `build-omp` compatibility target, and cleaned both binaries. Extended `scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh` to assert default build/install path targets `omr`. Checkpoint commit: 5c8c7223a2007c15857f522b58194b7e122548a0.

tasks.title: Refactor TUI around routing-stack target browser and detail/chain editing
tasks.verification: Refactored the TUI target browser and fallback editor to present routing stacks around primary model plus fallback chain.
tasks.summary: Updated target list rendering to use `BuildRoutingStacks`, show `Routing Stacks` as the primary browser title, render primary/pending primary and fallback counts from routing-stack state, and keep ADV provider items separate. Added routing-stack detail context to the fallback chain editor with target and primary model before the editable fallback list. Preserved existing add/remove/reorder behavior and legacy key-hint expectations. Added tests for routing-stack title, primary/fallback description, and primary detail in the chain editor. Checkpoint commit: 9e223117287be804302268880cac772d44ea6eef.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated target list rendering to use `BuildRoutingStacks`, show `Routing Stacks` as the primary browser title, render primary/pending primary and fallback counts from routing-stack state, and keep ADV provider items separate. Added routing-stack detail context to the fallback chain editor with target and primary model before the editable fallback list. Preserved existing add/remove/reorder behavior and legacy key-hint expectations. Added tests for routing-stack title, primary/fallback description, and primary detail in the chain editor. Checkpoint commit: 9e223117287be804302268880cac772d44ea6eef.

tasks.title: Wire preview-before-apply into the routing UI
tasks.verification: Post-acceptance-review fix added: preview confirmation now applies the stored preview plan, not recomputed preferences. Checkpoint commit 38e6bc3512d554b6121d2aef0a3e869ac65a7ac7.
tasks.summary: Added `viewPreview` earlier. Post-review remediation extracted `config.ApplyPreparedPlan(plan)` and changed preview confirmation to call it with `m.previewPlan`, preserving exact preview/apply bytes. Added regression test proving confirmation writes the previewed model even if in-memory preferences drift after preview. Checkpoint commits: 43bef7418b6f732441362f331872c733a04b86a3 and 38e6bc3512d554b6121d2aef0a3e869ac65a7ac7.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `viewPreview` earlier. Checkpoint commits: 43bef7418b6f732441362f331872c733a04b86a3 and 38e6bc3512d554b6121d2aef0a3e869ac65a7ac7.

tasks.title: Update OMR-native docs and run cross-stack verification
tasks.verification: Release hardening fixes added and verified. Checkpoint commit a7c29ee4d0219ec546bdd9ec9149002989b5b9a2.
tasks.summary: Updated OMR docs and verification earlier. Post-hardening remediation removed stale README future-phase wording and placeholder `.adv` link, and replaced an old change-specific comment in `scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh` with generic build/install contract wording. Verification: `make build`, `make build-omp`, `scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh`, `scripts/e2e-smoke.sh`, `make test`, `make build-plugin`, `make lint`, and post-hardening `make test` + `make lint` passed. Checkpoint commits: c779cadb5ee1edd0214841236d89928af7f16140 and a7c29ee4d0219ec546bdd9ec9149002989b5b9a2.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated OMR docs and verification earlier. Post-hardening remediation removed stale README future-phase wording and placeholder `.adv` link, and replaced an old change-specific comment in `scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh` with generic build/install contract wording. Verification: `make build`, `make build-omp`, `scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh`, `scripts/e2e-smoke.sh`, `make test`, `make build-plugin`, `make lint`, and post-hardening `make test` + `make lint` passed. Checkpoint commits: c779cadb5ee1edd0214841236d89928af7f16140 and a7c29ee4d0219ec546bdd9ec9149002989b5b9a2.

wisdom.content: `adv_change_update` treats empty string fields as writes, not omissions. When updating one artifact, omit unrelated fields rather than passing `""`, or proposal/agreement/design can be overwritten with empty content.

Makefile dry-run contract tests are a cheap structural guard for binary rename/build-install expectations: assert `make -n build` targets `cmd/omr` and `make -n install` copies `omr`, while preserving hook side-effect checks.

For Bubbletea refactors, keep the root Model flat but make list items carry domain view models (`RoutingStack`) instead of recomputing UI-only state. This preserves current key handling while shifting correctness to tested domain helpers.

Preview-before-apply is safest as a normal Bubbletea view: build the same pure ApplyPlan used by apply, render `plan.Preview()`, and only call the mutation path from an explicit confirm key in that view.

`make lint` requires plugin dependencies to exist. In a fresh worktree, run `make build-plugin` (frozen Bun install + typecheck) before `make lint`, or lint can fail with missing `bun-types` even though source is valid.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal via inline Tier A reply: 'continue'. B/F/S scan pass; Coverage: B:C F:C S:C. Scope sections present. Discovery agenda captured.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery complete. Findings persisted. Agreement and acceptance criteria approved by user via inline reply: approve. User decisions: add omr binary, manual one-time legacy migration only/no supported OMP migration, manual-only routing chains with add/move/reorder support.

design.approval_evidence: Design recorded and independently validated. Validator verdict VALIDATED with one simplicity caution: keep flat root Bubbletea Model with view-specific files/methods; avoid independent root submodels. No unresolved conflict or contract-compromise risk.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep via inline reply: approve. Task graph has 6 tasks: 3 ready, 3 blocked. Validation passed with expected no-deltas warning.

execution.approval_evidence: All six planned tasks completed with checkpoint commits. Final verification passed: make build, make build-omp, scripts/test-makefile-targets.sh, scripts/e2e-smoke.sh, make test, make build-plugin, and make lint.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted via inline reply: approve. Independent acceptance review verdict PASS_WITH_FIXES; one in-scope preview/apply drift issue fixed and checkpointed at 38e6bc3512d554b6121d2aef0a3e869ac65a7ac7. Post-fix verification passed: make test and make lint.

release.approval_evidence: User provided archive sign-off via inline Tier B whitelist reply: sign off. Release hardening passed with in-scope fixes checkpointed at a7c29ee4d0219ec546bdd9ec9149002989b5b9a2; final make test and make lint passed.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal references authentication/authorization without specifying the model. What auth mechanism will be used?
Scope section is empty or placeholder. What specific files/modules will change?
